name: Sweet Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Sweet potatoes or yams (about 2 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the sweet potatoes. Prick each potato 2 or 3 times with a fork to allow steam to escape. Arrange them in the oven at least 1 inch apart. Microwave on HIGH (100%) until fork-tender, 8 to 10 minutes. Cover and let stand 5 minutes.
2. Peel and slice the potatoes. Place them in a 2-quart casserole dish. Add 1/4 cup butter and salt. Mash until no lumps remain. Mix in the pineapple. Microwave on HIGH (100%) for 2 minutes. Stir and set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, mix 1 tablespoon brown sugar, 1 tablespoon butter, water, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Microwave on HIGH (100%) until butter is melted, 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, stirring after half the time. Add marshmallows; toss to coat. Top the sweet potato mixture with marshmallows. Microwave on HIGH (100%) for 2 to 4 minutes until the marshmallows are melted and potatoes are heated through. Sprinkle with pecans.
